name: quest
description: Goal-loop engineering for coding agents: plan work as evidence-checkable quest contracts, execute them in iterative loops with checkpoints, orchestrate workers, and mine retros into protocol amendments.

interface.shortDescription: Goal-loop engineering: quest contracts, iterative execution, checkpoints
interface.longDescription: Use Quest to turn asks into evidence-checkable quest contracts, execute them in iterative loops that end in verifiable checkpoints, orchestrate parallel workers across waves, and mine retrospectives into numbered protocol amendments.
